dashboard.confluence_intro_text: — Only shows signals scored ≥ 75/100 by AI. Telegram receives all signals, Dashboard only shows the highest-quality setups that passed the R:R, SMC context, ATR, and risk management filter.
dashboard.history_winrate_desc: Win rate based on actual R received (0 closed trades) — a trade that hits TP1/TP2 before being pulled back to SL still counts as a WIN, since real profit (+R) was already locked in before it closed.

landing.hero_sub: Automated Price Action & SMC signals from MT5, in-depth AI analysis, real-time updates. Built for serious traders.
landing.features_sub: From MT5 technical signals to in-depth AI analysis — everything is automated, transparent, and verifiable.
landing.feature1_desc: The THIENMINHGOLD indicator runs directly on MetaTrader 5, detecting Price Action signals in real time — Entry, SL, TP accurate down to the pip.
landing.feature2_desc: Claude AI analyzes market structure, Order Blocks, FVGs, and provides clear commentary under 150 words — easy to understand for any trader level.
landing.feature3_desc: Real-time web dashboard with TradingView chart, signal history, win rate stats, and AI Agent Q&A — all in one secure interface.
landing.results_note: Sample data — real results update automatically from the system
landing.how_sub: Fully automated — no need to watch the chart constantly.
landing.step1_desc: The THIENMINHGOLD indicator scans market structure 24/5, detecting BOS, OB, FVG across timeframes.
landing.step2_desc: Claude AI receives the data, writes Price Action & SMC analysis, confirms a sound R:R ratio.
landing.step3_desc: A complete signal with Entry/SL/TP and analysis is sent to the group instantly — under 10 seconds.
landing.step4_desc: AI scores each signal 0–100. Only setups scoring ≥ 75 make it to the Dashboard — ensuring the highest quality.
landing.confluence_h2: AI Confluence Filter picks only the best trades
landing.confluence_sub: Telegram receives all signals. The Dashboard only shows setups scored ≥ 75/100 by AI — after checking R:R, SMC structure, ATR, and risk management.
landing.pill1_desc: — Only accepts setups with a minimum 1:1.5 Risk:Reward ratio
landing.pill2_desc: — Checks whether entry is near an Order Block, FVG, or Liquidity zone
landing.pill3_desc: — Filters out trades with SL too wide or too tight relative to actual volatility
landing.pill4_desc: — Comprehensive evaluation before appearing on the Dashboard
landing.testimonials_sub: Hundreds of traders use the system every day to improve their trading results.
landing.cta_sub: Join the Trading AI VIP channel — get high-quality signals, 1:1 support, and a free SmartGold EA when you open an account via our IB link.
landing.footer_desc: An automated trading signal system combining Price Action, Smart Money Concepts, and AI analysis — built for the Vietnamese trading community.
landing.footer_disclaimer: ⚠️ Risk Warning: Forex and cryptocurrency trading carries high risk. Signals are for reference only, not investment advice. You may lose your entire investment.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Enter your assigned account details to continue.

register.hero_sub: Automated Gold trading EA — smart Recovery + Hedge. Choose the plan that fits you.
register.plan_ib_desc: Open a broker account through our IB link
register.plan_ib_feat4: Requires: open account via IB link
register.plan_info_ib: ✅ You're registering for the IB Free plan — free when you open an account via IB link
register.telegram_hint: We'll contact you on Telegram to send your key
register.account_hint: Your key will be tied to this account number
register.label_iblink: IB link you used to open the account
register.iblink_hint: Copy the link from the broker's confirmation email, or ask admin
register.payment_sub: Scan the QR code or transfer using the details below
register.qr_instructions: 📱 Open your banking app → Scan → Verify details → Transfer
register.important_note:
⚠️ Important: Please use the exact transfer note so admin can confirm quickly.
After transferring, enter the transaction ID below and click "Confirm Payment".
register.txn_hint: Copy the transaction ID from your banking app after a successful transfer
register.success_text:
We've received your request.
Your License Key will be sent automatically via Telegram after payment confirmation.
register.important_step_text:
To receive your License Key automatically, you must message the bot first:

1. Click the button below
2. Tap "Start" or type /start
3. Wait a few minutes after payment is confirmed ✅
register.join_group_text: After starting, you can join the group to follow signals!
register.binance_instructions: 📱 Open Binance app → Send → Scan the code or paste the wallet address below
register.binance_warning:
⚠️ Important: Only send USDT via the TRC20 (Tron) network. Sending via a different network (BEP20, ERC20...) may result in permanent loss of funds.
After sending, enter the Transaction Hash/ID below and click "Confirm Payment".
register.paypal_instructions: Click the button below to open PayPal and send payment directly. After sending, come back here and enter the PayPal transaction ID.
register.paypal_warning:
⚠️ Note: PayPal may charge additional currency conversion fees depending on your bank/card.
After paying, enter the Transaction ID below and click "Confirm Payment".

member_portal.login_sub: Enter your Account ID and License Key to view license info, renew, and track performance.
member_portal.login_hint: No License Key yet? Register for SmartGold EA or get your key automatically via Telegram after payment.
member_portal.renew_text: Transfer using the details below, then click "Send Renewal Request" — Admin will confirm and activate as soon as possible.
member_portal.journal_desc: See why AI entered each trade

journal.page_sub: Every signal is a lesson — see why AI entered each trade and the post-trade review after it closed.
journal.empty_text:
📖 No trades in the Journal yet.
The Journal will show once the first trade closes.
journal.modal_postmortem_waiting: Waiting for AI analysis after the trade closes...

analytics.table_score: ⭐ Win Rate by AI Confluence Score
analytics.learning_title: 🧠 AI Learning Patterns (Module 3) — Historical evidence AI uses to decide

ai_decisions.page_sub: A log of every decision the AI makes before a signal is sent.
ai_decisions.intro_html: AI doesn't just score — AI decides. Every signal from the indicator goes through this check before being sent. REJECT = not sent, WARN = sent with a warning, APPROVE = sent normally.
ai_decisions.empty_logs:
⚖️ No decisions recorded yet.
Decision Engine will activate as soon as a new signal arrives.
ai_decisions.error_api:
⚠️ Could not connect to API.
Make sure START_BOT.bat is running.
ai_decisions.error_risk: ⚠️ Could not load current Risk status.
